title: Ocean's Enhancements
description: Mod enhancing ocean's environment with sea horses, sea shells, pearls, anemones and more!
body:
![Oceans Enhancements](https://i.imgur.com/UqDQawy.png) ## ALPHA ## Requires GeckoLib A mod enhancing the ocean environment by adding vibrant life and small immersive details. ### Includes - 🐠 Seahorses in various colors - 🌊 Luminescent seahorses in deeper waters - 🐟 Clownfish, Blue Tang, and Goldfish - 🦪 Pearl Oysters — produce pearls underwater, collectable with right-click and regrow over time - 🪸 Multiple coral types — Bubble Coral emits bubbles when placed - 🐚 Seashells — collectable with right-click - 💎 Pearls — usable for crafting and decorations Explore and enjoy your slightly enriched oceans. ### Notes *New vegetation will only spawn in newly generated chunks.* ### This mod is currently in **ALPHA** — core content may still change. Using this mod together with many other mob mods may cause animation lag and reduce overall performance.
### Please do not redistribute this mod, re-uploading it to other websites is not permitted. You may include this mod in modpacks or videos with proper credit. ## 🌸 My Other Mods [![Lily Pads Expansion](https://i.imgur.com/XoZw68n.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/lily-pads-expansion) [![3D Placeable Food](https://i.imgur.com/TeDXOFZ.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/3d-placeable-food) [![Travel Bites](https://i.imgur.com/T4TAAYK.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/travel-bites) [![Magic Vibe Decorations](https://i.imgur.com/rY5XsS9.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/magic-vibe-decorations) [![Christmas Culinary](https://i.imgur.com/fAZMMKr.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/christmas-culinary) [![Valentine’s Blessing: Lilypads & Roses](https://i.imgur.com/36v0Ytd.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/valentines-blessing-lilypads-roses) [![Oceans Enhancements](https://i.imgur.com/P4TYDnM.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/oceans-enhancements) ## ☕ Support If you enjoy my work, you can support me here: [![Support me on Ko-fi](https://i.imgur.com/1PyT37T.png)](https://ko-fi.com/LillouArts)
